source_note: Energy Balancing Account (EBA) Audit for Rocky Mountain Power for Calendar Year 2022 by Daymark Energy Advisors — Public Executive Summary (filed Nov 7, 2023 as a Utah Division of Public Utilities exhibit), Docket No. 23-035-01 — the independent audit of the prudence/recovery of RMP's net power (fuel & purchased-power) costs trued up through the EBA for CY2022: RMP requested recovery of ~$175 million in deferred EBA costs; Daymark found outages at 4 units 'demonstrated sufficient imprudence that we recommend reducing EBA' (8 pp). Predecessor-year companion to the seeded CY2023 EBA audit (24-035-01). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Utah PSC document repository (pscdocs.utah.gov/electric/23docs/2303501/). Page-1 verified 2026-06-10.
